task_completion.description: A circular selection or shape is created on the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ellipse Select tool outline (marching ants) or a distinct circular shape drawn on the image canvas.

task_completion.description: The circular selection is positioned in the center of the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the position of the circle; its center should roughly align with the center of the image canvas.

task_completion.description: The circular shape is appropriately sized (roughly 15-65% of the image area).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The circle should not be a tiny dot nor should it cover the entire image; it should occupy a moderate, visible portion of the canvas.

task_completion.description: The circular region is filled with a color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The interior of the circular selection should be completely filled with a solid color, obscuring the original image content inside the circle.

task_completion.description: The fill color is bright and saturated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The color inside the circle should be visually bright and highly saturated (e.g., bright red, neon green, bright yellow, etc.), not dark, dull, or grayscale.

integrity.description: The agent used the image editor's GUI tools to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for active tool selections in the GIMP toolbox (e.g., Ellipse Select Tool, Bucket Fill Tool) and cursor interactions on the canvas, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The image was modified within the actual image editor application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image canvas inside the GIMP interface should show the modifications, ensuring the agent didn't just open a pre-modified image or edit a screenshot.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script to bypass manual GUI editing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal/command prompt should not show ImageMagick or Python scripts being executed to automatically draw the circle.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is a GIMP image editing exercise. Verify that a circular region is created (circularity score >= 0.6), sized appropriately (15-65% of the image area), positioned in the center of the image, and filled with a bright/saturated color.
